Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kelarac]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — Kelarac is known as the Collector of Souls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Kelarac is said to take souls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Kelarac is a being residing at the bottom of the sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Kelarac is the origin of the Lyathatan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Calder made a bargain with Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac is a Great Elder whose name means ‘Collector of Souls’.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac has a reputation as a shrewd bargainer whose deals often doom the other party.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac was the only known Great Elder without a specific domain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac gathers power from humans by granting wishes in exchange for items of value.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac is chained to a drowned city beneath the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac has been called the Father of Merchants, the Lord of Coin, the Gambler’s Delight, Miser’s Bane, the Keeper of the Vaults, the Hoard-gatherer, and the Seeker of Treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac wears a silver metal band over his eyes that acts as a steel blindfold bolted into his sockets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac has dark skin and the poise of a Heartlander.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac is a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac is a Reader of Memory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac has ringed fingers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac has a gold-capped smile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac has a steel-shrouded head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac wears a steel blindfold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac has jeweled hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac has a deep and fathomless mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — The Emperor senses Kelarac upon Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Kelarac could be said to grant wishes.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Kelarac is rumored to wait at the bottom of the Aion alongside Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Kelarac keeps the souls of those who fall afoul of his deals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Gardeners would send The Testament down to Kelarac.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Calder has the approval of Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Kelarac is still free to act.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Kelarac is a figure whose service is tied to the Lyathatan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Kelarac is a place or entity mentioned in relation to going down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Kelarac gave Calder an Awakened blade to use against Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Kelarac uses dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Kelarac is a person mentioned in relation to sending ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Kelarac is a Great One and the Soul Collector.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Kelarac claims to know the secrets of time, worlds, the future, and human Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Kelarac is known as the Soul Collector and is sealed at the bottom of the ocean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Kelarac's face was so distorted that his cheeks looked like a mask stapled onto someone else's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan compares the experience of using the Optasia to staring into the eyes of Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Jerri perceives Kelarac's will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Kelarac was singlehandedly sent a rebel fleet down to Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Kelarac was a fashionable Heartlander with a thin beard and gold teeth.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Kelarac is mentioned in relation to the Emperor's ability to Read.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Kelarac does not have eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Kelarac is a figure associated with the era of the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Kelarac is a being that could potentially rise from the sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Estyr intends to send Calder Marten down to Kelarac.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Kelarac left a six-fingered handprint burned into Calder's forearm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Calder has Kelarac’s warm handprint on his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Kelarac left a handprint on Calder's skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Calder has a connection to Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Kelarac is said to collect anything thrown into the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Calder has felt the force of will projected by Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — The Lyathatan is a creature of Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Kelarac possesses infinite knowledge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Kelarac is someone Cheska mentions in a threat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Kelarac addresses Calder as Reader of Memory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Kelarac wears a blindfold with rivets that reflect fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Kelarac's shadow contains a thousand unseen shapes and blinking eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Kelarac once threatened Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Kelarac is known to keep his bargains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Kelarac laced his lies with truth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Kelarac has a gold-ringed hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Kelarac's body is bronze and craggy like an intricate statue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Kelarac has a shark's head with silvery, triangular teeth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Kelarac has a dorsal fin the size of a tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Kelarac has a mark that can be used to sense Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Kelarac warned Calder about the limitations of the Awakened blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Kelarac stated that there is a law beyond this world that binds even their kind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Kelarac is alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Kelarac is described as a fool rather than a puppet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Kelarac is an ocean creature large enough to blot out the sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac's skin resembles an ancient stone wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac has ghostly chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac is a location or entity associated with an Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac needs Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac's power involves an Intent of greed and possession.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac has a glossy brown braid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac has thin caramel-skinned hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Kelarac's war is one name for the battle against Kelarac.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Kelarac likes to buy people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Kelarac was blinded and nailed to the floor of the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Kelarac placed a mark on his favorite slaves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Kelarac is mentioned by Estyr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Kelarac is a person Calder Marten was accused of consorting with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Kelarac holds the reins of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Kelarac has influence over the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Kelarac is a person whom Calder Marten is allegedly enthralled by.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten is a pawn of Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Calder was marked by Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Kelarac gave Jyrine a gift that had a happy and muted song.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Kelarac is a location that can be returned to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Kelarac's actions involve fuel and risk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Kelarac is a threat that the city needs to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Soulbound are needed to fight Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Jorin believes what is coming is worse than Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Kelarac is open to negotiation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Urg’naut stated he is not Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Urg'naut mentioned that Kelarac is coming.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac is on his way and may be on the same level as the Creeping Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac may have restored Calder Marten to life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac is described as a fool by Loreli.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Kelarac is capable of offering deals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The first challenge in the war against Kelarac was fitting everyone aboard Navigator ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Bareius was preparing for a battle with Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac is a shark-like creature with stony skin and a steel blindfold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac has a rusted steel blindfold bolted to his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac can take a stone shark form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac was devoured from the inside by energy turning on its origin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac is a source of energy for Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Kelarac claims he can be put into an object and thrown into the ocean to become no threat for centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Kelarac's power lives only in Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Kelarac has an arsenal of weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — Kelarac is dead.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
